bird.name: White-chinned myzomela
bird.summary: The white-chinned myzomela (Myzomela albigula) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in the Louisiade Archipelago.

locations.name: 路易西亞德群島
locations.summary: 路易西亞德群島是巴布亞新幾內亞的群島，位於該國東南面太平洋海域，北面是所羅門海，南面是珊瑚海，由10個火山島和90個珊瑚島組成，總面積1,600平方公里，人口約17,000。 外部連結 Louisiade Archipelago rain…

relations.subject: White-chinned myzomela
relations.evidence: It is found in the Louisiade Archipelago
